title: ChangePlan
description: Pre-build object Gamma writes before dispatching a builder. Phase 3J artifact. The shape gives Reviewer + req-reviewer + Compliance an explicit contract: what was promised, what was touched, what crosses a boundary.

goal.description: One-sentence description of the change in plain English.

expectedFiles.description: Repo-relative paths the builder is expected to add or modify.

expectedRequirements.description: Story IDs (GS-/HL-) the change should satisfy or update.

possibleDownstreamFeatures.description: Other feature slugs that might be affected. Drawn from requirements.graph.json features[<slug>].usedBy.

sharedContractsTouched.description: Contracts from requirements/04-architecture/contracts/ that this change MAY modify or depend on.

humanDecisionNeeded.description: Whether a Class C-level decision is anticipated. Triggers a Beta consult before Gamma dispatches the builder.

riskClassAtPlanTime.description: Best-guess risk class at planning time. Final classification is computed by classify-drift.js after the build.

notes.description: Free-form context for reviewers. Not consumed by automation.
